song.title: I Love Thy Kingdom Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) I love Thy kingdom, Lord, The house of Thine abode, The Church our blest Redeemer bought With His own precious blood.
[V2] 2) I love Thy Church, O God! Her walls before Thee stand, Dear as the apple of Thine eye And graven on Thy hand.
[V3] 3) For her my tears shall fall, For her my prayers ascend; To her my cares and toils be giv’n Till toils and cares shall end.
[V4] 4) Beyond my highest joy I prize her heavenly ways, Her sweet communion, solemn vows, Her hymns of love and praise.
[V5] 5) Sure as Thy truth shall last, To Zion shall be given The brightest glories earth can yield And brighter bliss of heaven.
song.author: Timothy Dwight
